---
title: "Dean Marchiori"
subtitle: "Applied Statistician | Data Scientist"
about:
  id: hero-heading 
  template: jolla
  image: "img/profile.png"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact Me
      href: mailto:dean@wavedatalabs.com.au
    - icon: calendar
      text: Book a meeting
      href: https://calendly.com/wavedata/meeting
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/deanmarchiori
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/deanmarchiori

---


:::{#hero-heading}
I'm a specialist independent consultant working with clients on complex problems across data science, applied mathematics, R programming, statistical modelling & machine learning.  

If you are interested in hiring me for a project get in touch: [dean@wavedatalabs.com.au](mailto:dean@wavedatalabs.com.au)   
::: 


## Bio  
Dean Marchiori is a Statistician specialising in computational statistics and applied mathematical modelling. He is Director and Principal Data Scientist at [Wave Data Labs](https://www.wavedatalabs.com.au/), Lead Data Scientist for the South Eastern Sydney Local Health District with NSW Health and Co-Chair of the Section for Statistical Computing and Visualisation with the Statistical Society of Australia. Dean obtained his Bachelor of Science in Mathematics with University Medal from Charles Sturt University. He also holds a Master of Applied Finance degree, and a Master of Applied Statistics from Macquarie University where he was awarded the Julian Leslie Prize in Statistics, and served as a sessional teaching academic in the School of Mathematical and Physical Sciences. Dean holds the [Accredited Statistician (AStat)](https://statsoc.org.au/Professional-accreditation) qualification from the Statistical Society of Australia and was named one of the top 10 analytics professionals in Australia by the [Institute of Analytics Professionals of Australia (IAPA)](https://www.iapa.org.au/).   

## [Consulting](consulting/) 

If you are interested in my work you can read some case studies, or see what my clients have to say about working with me on my [consulting page](consulting/index.qmd). Below are some recent projects delivered.

- 🕵 [**Anomaly detection and cluster analysis for financial crime detection:**](consulting/2024-01-01-service-2/) I built an automated system to detect suspicious companies and complex shell relationships. 
- 🔥 [**Australian Bushfire Risk Analysis & Mapping:**](consulting/2024-01-01-service-1/) This interactive analysis was the first of its kind to highlight bushfire planning risk for the entire Australian mainland and recieved nationwide media coverage.   
- 🦟 [**Data Systems and Analytics for Vector-Borne Disease Threat Reduction:**](consulting/2024-10-11-eco/) I partnered with EcoHealth Alliance on a major scientific research project focused on two WHO priority zoonoses, Rift Valley fever virus and Crimean-Congo hemorrhagic fever virus.
- 👶 [**Analysis and mapping of access to Assisted Reproductive Technologies:**](consulting/2024-01-01-service-4/) Did you know over half a million Australians live more than 240km from an Assisted reproductive technology clinic and would likely have to sleep nearby in order to visit.  


## [Blog](posts/)  

I occassionally write [blog posts](/posts/) about data and statistics. Some of my greatest hits are below:  

- 🥊 [**Man vs Machine Learning:**](posts/2023-06-02-man-vs-ml-20230619T002502Z-001/2023-06-02-man-vs-ml/) I went head-to-head with Microsoft’s AutoML platform in a predictive modelling challenge - and won! (sort of)  
- 🏠 [**How to book an Airbnb with Math:**](posts/2025-03-05-star-ratings/) Choosing an Airbnb using mathematical analysis of user review data.  
- 🌏 [**Geolocating Sydney’s weirdest property:**](posts/2023-09-17-geolocating/) Using Open Street Map and R to geolocate a tweet of Sydney's strangest house.  
- 🔧 [**Integrating R with Modern Tech Stacks:**](posts/2024-12-02-r-docker/) A Practical Guide to Using R and Docker for Integrating Statistical Analysis into Modern Tech Stacks.

## Open Source   

If you would like to see how I code, all of my public projects are hosted on [Github](https://github.com/deanmarchiori) 

- ⚙️ [**End-to-End MLOps in R:**](https://github.com/deanmarchiori/r-model-template) A full example project of end-to-end MLOps model deployment in R.
- 📘 [**Data Science Workflows in R:**](https://datasciworkflows.netlify.app/) An introduction to deploying production quality R code. 
- ☀️ [**{weatherOz}:**](https://docs.ropensci.org/weatherOz/) An API Client for Australian Weather and Climate Data Resources. [R Package, co-author]  
- 🐶 [**bluey-search:**](https://deanmarchiori.shinyapps.io/blueysearch/) Does your child explain Bluey episodes to you but you have no idea what episode they are talking about and can't handle flicking through all 130 of them? Problem solved. [shiny app, author]
- 📋 [**analysis-flow:**](https://github.com/deanmarchiori/analysis-flow) Data Analysis Workflows & Reproducibility Learning Resources. [resource list]

## Publications  

To view a verified list of my scientific publications see [ORCiD](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3430-7225)  

- Pires et al., (2024). **weatherOz: An API Client for Australian Weather and Climate Data Resources in R**. Journal of Open Source Software, 9(98), 6717, [https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.06717](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.06717)   
- Wilson R, Wickramasuriya R, Marchiori D. **An Empirical Modelling and Simulation Framework for Fire Events Initiated by Vegetation and Electricity Network Interactions.** Fire. 2023; 6(2):61. [https://doi.org/10.3390/fire6020061](https://doi.org/10.3390/fire6020061)  
- Marchiori, D. (2022). **Meta-Analysis of Clinical Phenotype and Patient Survival in Neurodevelopmental Disorder with Microcephaly, Arthrogryposis, and Structural Brain Anomalies Due to Bi-allelic Loss of Function Variants in SMPD4.** medRxiv, 2022-10. [https://doi.org/10.1101/2022.10.08.22280875](https://doi.org/10.1101/2022.10.08.22280875)

## Talks  

Below are some invited talks, workshops and other events of note:  

- **2025-11-25:** I gave a contributed talk at the [Biometrics in the Bush Capital](https://biometricsociety.org.au/conference2025/) conference at ANU in Canberra. The Australasian Region Biometrics conference is a biennial conference sponsored by the International Biometric Society (Australasian Region). The conference is a forum for biometricians, statisticians, and those interested in the development and application of statistical and mathematical theory and methods to problems in the biosciences. [[Slides](https://deanmarchiori.github.io/biometrics-2025-talk)]
- **2025-11-23:** I co-organised the [2025 OceaniaR](https://statsocaus.github.io/oceaniar-hack-2025/) Dev Day and hackathon at ANU in Canberra. The event had a focus on promoting projects and participation from R users in the Oceania region including Australia, New Zealand and the Pacific Islands
- **2025-09-29:** I delivered a half-day workshop for [WOMBAT2025](https://wombat2025.numbat.space/) the Workshop Organised by the Monash Business Analytics Team (WOMBAT). The title was *Introduction to Regression Analysis in R*. [[Resources](https://deanmarchiori.github.io/regression_course/)]   
- **2024-10-22:** I was invited to deliver a half-day workshop for [WOMBAT2024](https://wombat2024.numbat.space/tutorial_AM3.html) the Workshop Organised by the Monash Business Analytics Team (WOMBAT). The title was *Turning R code into production quality software*. [[Resources](https://datasciworkflows.netlify.app/)]   
- **2024-10-21:** I co-organised the first [OceaniaR Hackathon](https://statsocaus.github.io/oceaniaR-hack/) day in Melbourne, the event had a focus on promoting projects and participation from R users in the Oceania region including Australia, New Zealand and the Pacific Islands. [[repo](https://github.com/StatSocAus/oceaniaR-hack)]  
- **2023-12-01:** I gave a half-day workshop for the [Statistical Society of Australia](https://statsoc.org.au/event-5490184) on *Deploying your model code into production with Microsoft Azure* [[Resources](https://github.com/StatSocAus/tutorial_deploywithazure)]  
- **2022-11-08:** I gave a talk called *BlueySearch: how to build and deploy a basic data science backed web app in R* at the Siligong Data Tech Meetup in Wollongong. [[slides](https://github.com/deanmarchiori/siligong-data-talk)]   
- **2021-01-21:** I gave a lightning talk at [rstudio::global](https://cloud.rstudio.com/resources/rstudioglobal-2021/) conference called *How reproducible am I? A retrospective on a year of commercial data science projects in R* [[video](https://youtu.be/4T8gz9AmNOA)]  
- **2021-12-01:** I presented at the Statistical Society of Australia's [Early Career and Student Statisticians Career Event 2021](https://www.statsoc.org.au/event-4559340) in Sydney. 
- **2021-12-01:** I was interviewed on the [Keeping Up With Data](https://pod.link/1561894306) podcast. [[video](https://pod.link/1561894306)]  
- **2019-11-28:** I gave an invited talk titled *Pearls and pitfalls of time series analysis using Google Analytics data* at [WOMBAT2019](https://www.monash.edu/business/events/past-events/general/wombat2019) workshop organised by the Monash Business Analytics Team, at the State Library Victoria. [[slides](https://github.com/deanmarchiori/WOMBAT2019)]
- **2018-10-16:** I Presented a seminar titled *Unsupervised outlier detection systems for e-commerce* as part of the SMART Seminar Series at the University of Wollongong. [[video](https://youtu.be/BMODMydyrR8)]

Featured interviews and talks:  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QC6yLHkG3u8?si=XqBinGF_ge-y8BWl&amp;start=67" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/4T8gz9AmNOA?si=wx0Qm7Wz7C6c9rex" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/BMODMydyrR8?si=IRV6JHQs5c_BjR2P" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
